# CAT LINK - LLM Quick Context

This file provides a minimal, stable project context for LLM/AI agents.
このファイルは、LLM/AIエージェント向けの最小かつ安定したプロジェクト文脈を提供します。

## 1) Project Summary / プロジェクト概要
- CAT LINK is a web application to create and share cat profiles.
- CAT LINKは、猫のプロフィールを作成・共有するWebアプリケーションです。
- Stack focus: React 18 + TypeScript + Supabase.
- 技術の中核は React 18 + TypeScript + Supabase です。

## 2) Tech Stack / 技術スタック
- Frontend: React 18, TypeScript, Vite, TailwindCSS
- State/Data: Zustand, React Query (@tanstack/react-query), React Router DOM, React Hook Form
- Backend/BaaS: Supabase (Auth, DB, Storage), Edge Functions
- External APIs: Google Analytics API, Google Gemini API
- Quality: Vitest, Testing Library, ESLint, Prettier

## 3) Run/Test/Lint Commands / 実行・テスト・Lint
- Setup: `cp .env.example .env`
- Start dev: `make up`
- Stop: `make stop` / teardown: `make down`
- Lint: `make lint`
- Format: `make format`
- Test: `make test`
- Coverage: `make test-coverage`

## 4) Key Directories/Files / 重要ディレクトリ・ファイル
- `src/` application code
- `src/components/` reusable UI components
- `src/pages/` route/page components
- `src/hooks/` custom hooks
- `src/lib/` API and utility integrations
- `src/store/` Zustand stores
- `src/types/` TypeScript types
- `supabase/functions/` Edge Functions
- `supabase/migrations/schema.sql` database schema
- `README.md` developer setup and commands
- `AGENTS.md` detailed engineering conventions for agents

## 5) Architecture Brief / アーキテクチャ要点
- Auth flow: Supabase Auth -> Zustand store
- Data fetching: React Query -> Supabase
- Image flow: client-side optimization -> Supabase Storage
- AI flow: Supabase Edge Functions -> Google Gemini API

## 6) Contribution Notes / 開発ルール要点
- Use TypeScript strict mode and keep type safety.
- Follow naming/import/testing conventions defined in `AGENTS.md`.
- Branch naming convention: `<type>/<issue-number>-<branch-overview>` (e.g., `feat/123-add-new-feature`)
  - type: `feat`, `fix`, `refactor`, `doc`, `chore`
- Commit messages follow Conventional Commits: `<type>: <summary>` (e.g., `feat: add new button`).

## 7) Source of Truth / 正本ドキュメント
- Primary references:
  - `AGENTS.md` (agent/development conventions)
  - `README.md` (environment setup and commands)
- When this file conflicts with those docs, follow `AGENTS.md` and `README.md`.

## Maintenance Policy / メンテナンス方針
Update this file when any of the following changes:
- core tech stack
- major commands (setup/run/test/lint/deploy)
- key directories or architecture flow
- contribution conventions affecting daily development
